frames.title: Aerial — Terrace Beside the Entry Plaza
frames.caption: Top-down view of the Café Terrace where the figure-eight loop closes at the entry plaza: a rammed-earth kiosk with its terracotta pergola apron, terrace tables spilling toward the path, restrooms tucked behind, the wadi bioswale and event lawn framing the scene.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic top-down drone shot slowly descending over a desert park café terrace beside an entry plaza in Dubai, a shaded figure-eight loop, terracotta pergolas and ghaf trees below, mid-morning golden light, calm and inviting mood.

frames.title: Approach — Arriving Off the Loop
frames.caption: Eye-level arrival from the loop path: the sand-toned rammed-earth kiosk with its striated walls, barista at the service window, deep terracotta pergola raking shade across terrace tables, ghaf trees and the event lawn beyond.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic steadicam shot walking along a sandy park path toward a small rammed-earth café kiosk with a terracotta pergola, a jogger carrying coffee passing by, late-morning desert light with long slat shadows, relaxed sociable mood.

frames.title: Walkthrough — Among the Terrace Tables
frames.caption: On the terrace under the pergola: slatted terracotta shade overhead, a couple lingering over juice and coffee, the barista at the counter, a runner finishing a loop lap with a cup in hand, and the event lawn and bioswale glimpsed past the planter wall.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow dolly gliding between café terrace tables beneath a terracotta slat pergola, striped shadows sweeping across the floor, a couple chatting over coffee and a barista working behind the counter, warm midday desert light, easy convivial mood.

frames.title: Flythrough — Drone Over the Event Lawn
frames.caption: Oblique drone view sweeping from the event lawn toward the café: the loop path curling past picnickers, the kiosk and its pergola apron in three-quarter view, terrace tables dotted with guests, restrooms behind and the bioswale threading the distance.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic FPV drone shot skimming low over a green event lawn then rising toward a rammed-earth café kiosk with terracotta pergolas at a park entry plaza, ghaf tree canopies brushing past the lens, golden late-afternoon light, energetic uplifting mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Opening Day
frames.caption: Opening day: the kiosk, pergola and terrace are complete but the landscape is young — staked ghaf saplings, fresh mulch beds with plant plugs, a pale new lawn, and the bare terracotta pergola waiting for its vines.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off wide shot of a newly opened desert park café with a bare terracotta pergola and small staked saplings, first guests at terrace tables, bright clean morning light, hopeful fresh-start mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Year Two
frames.caption: Year two from the same vantage point: the ghaf trees have shed their stakes and doubled in size, planting beds are knitting together, the lawn has deepened, and the first vine is climbing a pergola post.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off wide shot of the same desert park café two years on, adolescent ghaf trees casting their first real shade and a young vine curling up a terracotta pergola post, warm mid-morning light, quietly maturing mood.

frames.title: Evolution — Year Five, Vine-Softened
frames.caption: Year five, identical framing: mature ghaf canopies layer over the terrace, understory planting spills toward the loop, and the terracotta pergola has softened under garlands of vine — the finish-line café fully grown into its garden.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic locked-off wide shot of a lush desert park café at year five, vines draping a terracotta pergola and broad ghaf canopies dappling the terrace, guests and a finishing runner in soft golden-hour light, settled abundant mood.

frames.title: Night — Warm Glow and String Lights
frames.caption: The walkthrough view after dark: the kiosk counter glows warm terracotta, string lights swing between the pergola posts, a candle flickers on the couple's table, and the bioswale catches the last blue of the sky beyond the terrace.
frames.videogen_prompt: Photorealistic slow dolly through a café terrace at night, string lights glowing under a terracotta pergola and warm light spilling from the kiosk counter across the tables, a couple by candlelight and a runner arriving with coffee, deep blue dusk sky, intimate glowing mood.
